builder_boundary: External builder may only own S4_BUILD after S3 implementation plan; it may not edit spec, verification plan, verifier, release, or push authority files.

verify_arch.reason: Spec declares multiple surfaces: superpower-skill-entry, install-runtime, verification-runtime.

acceptance.then: entry recap names S0 through S6, maps stages to skills, states current state/action, and uses natural language rather than boilerplate
entry behavior keeps the session in S0_DISCUSS until material unknowns are resolved
each stage in the entry recap carries a named skill mapping or explicit conditional skill
Claude and Codex active installs resolve through stable current pointers after pinning
active registries fail verification when Superpower entries hard-pin versioned cache paths
only S4_BUILD executor may become external after explicit confirmation
verification misses are recorded as structured checklist or archetype feedback and unresolved P2/P3 blocks signoff
completion claims require gate evidence and missing evidence forces blocked or partial wording
